issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as handling missing routes or API errors.

scenarios.name: CRUD task list with SvelteKit form actions and progressive enhancement
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses +page.server.ts actions returning fail()/redirect() with use:enhance and the form prop in +page.svelte; baseline uses client-side fetch that breaks without JS.

scenarios.name: Hybrid prerendered marketing + authed dashboard on Vercel
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines prerender=true on marketing pages, adapter-vercel, and hooks.server.ts with sequence() to gate /dashboard server-side; baseline uses adapter-auto and client-side localStorage auth.
